title: Level 915

{{Blurquote|image=Glitched Earth.jpeg|quote-text=“What I have seen is something no god could understand, it is something, uniquely human, for gods do not bleed Ibrahim, they do not bleed.”|person=Harry Gelvins}} [[File:FunnyBSOD.png|thumb|186px|link=]]
'''Survival Difficulty: Class Error'''
'''》Fatal Error'''
'''》Gelvins was here'''
'''》Cant, Breathe.'''
'''[[Level 915]]''' is the 916th level of the Backrooms.
==Description== '''Level 915''', also known as "TEST_CONSTRUCT" is an environmentally hazardous, constantly morphing, enigmatic level of the Backrooms; '''Level 915''' takes the appearance as ''Memories'' of the wanderer who gets trapped within its confines, it will often take the appearance of memories long forgotten from the mind of the individual creating a hazy experience tailored to the individuals likeness, some major details however may be missing from the level, this includes the lack of other individuals which may have been present in the original memory. Other missing parts may include: slightly askew items of furniture, altered or ''"Washed Out"'' colours, missing windows and flipped/reversed orientation of the memory; This area is the most stable location within the level; This area however, deteriorates rapidly; Overtime small ''"Errors"'' may appear as a result of the deterioration, this may occur: in the walls, floors, ceilings, furniture, or other items within the memory; These errors are highly unstable and interaction may cause no-clipping into [[The Void]] and a tell-tale sign of needing to find an exit to the level as soon as possible; After 1-2 hours of being within the level all reasonable exits will be closed off. This part of the level is known as the ''"Great Dividing Range"'', past this point it is unclear if any exits even occur, let alone are able to be accessed; This area of the level is known as the '''Great Dividing Range''' as anyone who made it to that point in the level has no way of going back as far as we have determined. The range itself is a large empty void, any unlucky wanderer who has made it to the '''Dividing Range''' will have to work there way through a high pressure and viscous atmosphere. The remaining parts of the stable level will rush through the void, it is unknown if they continue infinitely or hit the limits of the level as the true size of the level has yet to be determined. This "Void" section is littered with glitches and patches within spacetime. These sections are to be avoided at all costs, The '''Dividing Range''' is littered with different sections of other levels which float through the abyss, these areas may contain small amounts of resources such as [[Object 1|Almond Water]]. However these resources rapidly deteriorate, it is recommended not to interact with objects in this section of the level as (Once Deteriorated) they will be conduits to cause temporal anomalies which can be memetic hazards to simply be around, these memetic hazards can quickly deteriorate an individual into a '''"Shell"''' of there former self. aspects of this may include constant unconsciousness as the lack of stimulation causes the brain to enter a state of being caused by extended loneliness. Other wanderers in the level cannot interact with any others within the level, this only enhances the isolation suffered by those in the level, however they can interact with items left behind by others in the level, objects such as notebooks, papers or other objects can be interacted with by anyone, Many place these items within areas that have a larger amount of stability in the level to avoid deterioration as quickly as it would usually occur.
==Entities== '''?'''
==Entrance & Exits== '''Entrances:''' Entrances are constantly changing and aren't fully grasped in terms of this level, however some confirmed entrances of those who have escaped the level are as follows: ''- Interacting with mirrors with no reflection'' ''- Finding patches in the walls, ceilings or floors of certain negative levels which seem to be images of distant memories of the one viewing it.'' ''- Areas of large empty voids which "Fade" into the level as one walks through it '' '''Exits:''' Exits are entirely dependant on the memory extracted from the individual, but usually they are: ''- Windows'' ''- Doors'' ''- Empty cars or Vehicles'' ''- Doorways or arches'' However once in the '''Great Dividing Range.''' it is unsure if exit is possible
==Ibrahim's Chronicle== This extract comes from a book originating from '''Level 915''' which had somehow ended up in [[Level 2]]. The original author is yet to be found, however it is suspected that the extract had come from the notebook glitching through a patch in [[Level 498]], the details listed in the book are the only details we have about the '''Great Dividing Range.''', but due to the books shockingly good state of condition and how it has ended up within [[Level 2]] it is theorized escape (although unlikely) is possible, many wilder theories have even suggested an exit from the backrooms itself. However these theories are most likely false. '''NOTE: The person stated as "Ibrahim" has not been determined if it an entity which may control or alter the level and if this is a "Worship" of some sort, a wanderer or someone in reality. Certain parts have been destroyed by the deterioration of the level and have had to be expunged or filled in.''' {{CSS|content=:root { --theme-page-background-color: transparent !important; }}}
[[File:Level 3345 Background.png|thumb]]
[[File:1130-2.gif|2000px]]
==To Ibrahim.== Its so cold, Its so cold. Without anyone in sight for thousands of miles, its so cold; There is no pain, there is almost nothing to be felt, everything seems hazy, as if some sort of dream. I almost, appear places. but its so dark I don't know if I've closed my eyes, this is a special type of hell Ibrahim. Something I don't wish on even the worst of our species, no, this is a hell that no-one should feel, no one should take in. What I have seen is something no god could understand, it is something, uniquely human, for gods do not bleed Ibrahim, they do not bleed. In the void I feel, as a space ship, I feel as a true wanderer, I remember telling you that I will fly amongst the stars someday, but there are no stars here Ibrahim. I am the furthest I have been from the stars, I am at the bottom of the world, I am unsure what I look like Ibrahim, I haven't talked to anyone in years, if it has been years. Its hard to know, Its hard to know what direction I'm going, if its up, or down. I remember my mothers face sometimes, she was such a happy woman, I told her I'd be back from the park soon enough, except that tree, it felt off. And then I was trapped, in a maze of sounds, sights and misdirection, a maze with no exit, a game with no prize. Sometimes I see those distant mazes, mazes I had crossed, mazes I had said would never bring me comfort, but in a world with nothing, even crafted evil feels comforting. Its something right? Everything feels hard to move through, its not worth fighting, I may have gone past hundreds of mazes, but only those in my path I may interact with, the mazes bring back reality, you know? The air isn't as thick, breathing isn't as difficult. I stay on these islands for days, months, sometimes years. But in the end I know that I must step off, that I must leave, as clinging on provides times for the darkness to strike, it gives it a way into your head. I scream a lot when on those islands of sanctity, scream at this world. God can't see me here, I'm to far away. Sometimes I give up and pray, for hours, pray for death. Pray for any way to leave, but it never comes. Ibrahim, I leave this to you; I Leave this to the many other Ibrahim's that may find this. The date is 12/02/1988 from my best counting, I originally entered this place on 4/01/1966. I am unsure when someone will find this, I hope its sometimes soon, I leave this on an island of sanctity, hoping it reaches somewhere out of this hell, No matter when this is found, know I am still here, Harry Gelvins is still here, going through this void, as far as I can make it. I wish for nobody else to find this place as It has found me, I hope death will take me one day. One of these days To Ibrahim, from Glevins, To the others who may find this, To the world. Goodbye.
==Closing Notes.== Level 915 is still largely unexplored, Harry Gelvin's note is one of the only things we can find. Due to this fact, the level has been colloquially known as "Gelvins Hell." [[Category:Class Error]] [[Category:Levels]] [[Category:Dangerous]] [[Category:Cluster I]]
